semantic.role: Unit test suite for the `normalizeRuleViolations` function from the validate task module.
responsibilities: Test normalization of valid violation objects with expected id, severity, and reason fields.
Test normalization of an empty array of violations.
Test normalization when input is null, expecting an empty array.
Test normalization when input is undefined, expecting an empty array.
Test normalization when input is a string or number (non-array), expecting an empty array.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end testing of the validate pipeline.
Testing other functions from the validate module (e.g., validateRules, checkViolations).
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a dedicated unit test suite to ensure the normalizeRuleViolations function handles edge cases robustly, maintaining data integrity in the validation pipeline.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added as part of a broader refactor that removed legacy CLI aliases, rebuilt documentation, fixed schema, and updated tests to align with the new validate module contract.
